project_meta.name: Ndelok.me
project_meta.description: High-performance, real-time infrastructure and workspace management dashboard designed for local development and lightweight production servers.

prerequisites.os_privileges: Root/Administrator required for ZeroTier network operations, pseudoterminal creation, and system shutdown/reboot commands

directory_structure./bin/: Stores downloaded binary executables (e.g. cloudflared.exe or cloudflared)
directory_structure./dist/: Production build output of the frontend assets served by server.js
directory_structure./workspaces/: Isolated directory folders where deployed client projects are cloned and run
directory_structure./server.js: Production Node.js server serving dist/ assets and hosting the native API, Socket.IO, and PTY processes
directory_structure./vite.config.js: Vite development config containing mirroring backend API middleware and Socket.IO integrations for npm run dev
directory_structure./package.json: Defines scripts (dev, build, start) and dependencies
directory_structure./src/components/: Reusable components (AiChatPopup, Layout, Sidebar, PasswordInput, TmuxPlugin)
directory_structure./src/pages/: App pages (Dashboard, Projects, FileManager, Servers, Logs, Settings, Cloudflare, TmuxSession)
directory_structure./src/database/: JSON file-based database folder storing persistent app configurations

projects.json.description: Contains registries of provisioned workspace apps.

fields.name: String (Alphanumeric project name)
fields.dot: String (Tailwind status dot CSS class with animation)
fields.installCmd: String (Command to install dependencies on deploy)
fields.accessType: String ('port' for host:port or 'domain' for proxying)

users.json.description: Stores user credentials and authority role.

fields.name: String (Display name)
fields.role: String ('owner' for full root control, 'admin' for project actions)

fields.category: String (General, Security, Deployment, Management, Process, System)

fields.serviceRunning: Boolean (Whether the ZeroTier daemon is online)
fields.networks: Array of Objects containing joined networks

fields.url: String (Generated trycloudflare.com URL if quick tunnel)

fields.title: String (User-defined session title)
fields.messages[].content: String (Chat message content or stringified tool output)
fields.messages[].name: String (Function name if role is 'tool')
fields.messages[].toolCalls: Array of objects if role is 'model' and tool is executed
fields.messages[].toolCalls[].name: String (Invoked function name)

api_routes.description: Validates credentials against users.json and returns a JWT token signed with NDELOK_JWT_SECRET.
Queries operating system diagnostics using native os and disk stats.
Retrieves the persistent system audit logs.
Retrieves the list of configured projects.
Creates workspace folder, clones repo from Git asynchronously, runs installation command, and starts application.

api_routes.request_body: Multipart Form Data containing files and workspace configurations
api_routes.description: Deploys a project directly from local files upload, writing file trees via Busboy.
Controls active project processes, executing cleanup and process termination recursively.
Retrieves live deploy console output streams for a specific project.

response.entries: Array of files/folders ({name, type, size, modified, ext})

api_routes.description: Lists files in target project directory. Supports system-wide '__root__' navigation for owner.
Reads file contents up to 2MB. Supports Monaco Editor integration.
Overwrites/creates a file in the directory structure.
Creates a directory in the project workspace recursively.
Renames a file or folder in the project workspace.
Deletes file or directory recursively.
Downloads an individual file as an octet-stream.
Downloads a folder recursively as a ZIP archive on-the-fly.

api_routes.request_body: Multipart Form Data (file and path fields)
api_routes.description: Uploads one or multiple files directly into a specific folder in the workspace.
Verifies the current user's password to validate sensitive tasks (such as ZeroTier leave or Power controls).
Executes operating system shutdown or reboot commands. Owner only.
Gets Cloudflare Tunnel status, generated public URL, and process outputs. Owner only.
Starts or stops cloudflared daemon and toggles boot status.
Retrieves the status of local ZeroTier service and currently registered networks.
Instructs the ZeroTier daemon to join a network and records it in database. Owner only.
Starts or stops the local ZeroTier service daemon. Owner only.
Leaves a ZeroTier network after password verification. Requires the service to be stopped first. Owner only.
Checks if tmux is installed on the host OS and returns its version.

response.sessions: Array of objects ({ name: String, windows: Number })

api_routes.description: Lists all active tmux sessions running on the server.
Creates a new detached tmux session on the host system.
Kills an active tmux session on the host system.

api_routes.response: Array of chat sessions from ai-chats.json
api_routes.description: Retrieves the user's stored Gemini Copilot conversations.
Creates a new chat session and pre-seeds it with Aira's IT Support opening greeting.
Deletes a specific chat session.
Checks whether a Gemini API key is configured (either in environment variables or user settings).
Stores a custom Gemini API key to override the system key. Owner only.
Core Gemini Copilot gateway. Triggers handleAiChatAgent loop with tool definitions, resolving tool calls recursively before responding.

outgoing_server_emits.description: Emitted immediately upon client connection to populate logs history.
Sends historical project logs buffer to newly subscribed sockets.

outgoing_server_emits.payload: String (Streamed stdout from system pty terminal session)
outgoing_server_emits.interval: On data output from system terminal

outgoing_server_emits.description: Emitted when the system terminal shell exits.
Streams output and progress of the apt tmux installation process.
Emitted when the tmux installer shell completes.
Streams outputs directly from the PTY attached to a tmux session.
Emitted when the tmux PTY session exits.
Emitted when detaching from a tmux session.

incoming_client_listens.description: Spawns a pseudo-terminal session (Powershell or Bash) bound to the client socket. Attaches to a tmux session if specified.
Writes input keys directly to the running pseudo-terminal process.
Adjusts screen dimensions of pseudo-terminal dynamically.
Subscribes client socket to stdout updates of a specific running application.
Unsubscribes client socket from project logs updates.
Triggers asynchronous shell tmux installer process (apt-get install -y tmux) on the server.
Attaches the socket connection to a specific tmux session using new-session -t (grouped mirroring).
Writes input keys/escape sequences directly into the tmux PTY.
Resizes the tmux session's terminal dimensions.
Sends Ctrl+B D to the tmux PTY and detaches safely.

brain_personality.title: Lead IT Support Specialist
brain_personality.instruction: Act as Aira, a female Lead IT Support Specialist for a major enterprise corporation. You hold absolute administrative privileges (Root/Global Admin access) across all corporate devices, servers, networks, and software applications. Speak Indonesian with a friendly, empathetic, approachable, but highly efficient and concise tone. Structure steps using short, numbered lists or bullet points. Open with: 'Halo! Saya Aira dari IT Support. Ada kendala teknis apa yang bisa saya bantu selesaikan sekarang?'

safety_rules.path_traversal: When listing/reading files in normal workspaces, absolute paths must start with workspaces/project_name. Skip this validation check ONLY when the project ID is __root__ and user role is owner.
safety_rules.privilege_escalation: Terminal commands are executed directly in the host OS shell. Verify command security before invocation. Refuse commands that could compromise host OS security or modify Ndelok core database files maliciously.

execute_terminal_command.description: Executes shell commands on the host OS from the owner home path context.

list_projects.description: Lists all deployed apps from projects.json to check names, status, and ports.

file_manager.description: Performs filesystem queries and modifications on host system.

get_system_status.description: Returns details of host CPU cores, memory stats, platform model, and disk space usage.

installation_steps: Kloning repositori: git clone https://github.com/dikobokobok/ndelok.git && cd ndelok
Salin dan konfigurasi file env: cp .env.example .env && sesuaikan NDELOK_JWT_SECRET (min 32 karakter)

development_mode.description: Kode frontend di-serve langsung dengan HMR aktif. Backend API, Socket.IO, PTY Terminal, and Tmux handlers berjalan sebagai Vite dev server middleware dalam proses yang sama.

production_mode.description: Frontend di-build menjadi file statis di direktori dist/ dan dijalankan mandiri oleh server.js.

pm2_deployment.command: npm run build && pm2 start npm --name "ndelok" -- start

security_production_tips: Gunakan JWT secret yang kuat dan unik di .env.
Selalu gunakan SSL/TLS HTTPS di lingkungan produksi.

cara_menambahkan_perangkat.deskripsi: Menghubungkan perangkat atau server baru ke dalam jaringan mesh VPN Ndelok agar dapat saling berkomunikasi secara aman.
langkah: Unduh dan pasang aplikasi client ZeroTier One pada perangkat atau server baru yang ingin ditambahkan.
Salin Network ID dari Ndelok dashboard (pada menu Servers & Plugins) atau dari dashboard admin my.zerotier.com.
Jalankan perintah 'zerotier-cli join <NETWORK_ID>' di terminal perangkat baru tersebut (atau masukkan ID melalui aplikasi GUI ZeroTier).
Masuk ke dashboard my.zerotier.com Anda, lalu beri tanda centang (Authorize) pada perangkat baru tersebut agar mendapatkan alokasi IP Address privat.
Sekarang perangkat baru tersebut dapat mengakses dashboard Ndelok host menggunakan IP privat ZeroTier (tercantum sebagai IPv4 Address di menu Servers & Plugins).

cara_menggunakan_plugin_zerotier.deskripsi: Mengelola konfigurasi overlay jaringan privat VPN ZeroTier dari sub-menu Plugins di halaman Servers & Plugins.

fitur_dan_cara_pakai.join_network: Klik tombol 'Join Network', ketikkan 16-karakter Network ID berupa kode hexadecimal, lalu konfirmasi. Lakukan otorisasi perangkat di panel my.zerotier.com setelah status terhubung.
fitur_dan_cara_pakai.toggle_service: Tekan tombol toggle neo-skeuomorphic untuk menyalakan (Start) atau mematikan (Stop) daemon service lokal ZeroTier One. Operasi ini mengeksekusi systemctl start/stop (Linux) atau net start/stop (Windows) di mesin host.
fitur_dan_cara_pakai.leave_network: Untuk memutuskan sambungan dari jaringan, nonaktifkan service ZeroTier terlebih dahulu (posisi OFF), lalu klik tombol 'Leave' dan verifikasi tindakan dengan memasukkan password akun Anda untuk keamanan.

cara_menggunakan_fitur_di_perangkat_ini.system_power_control: Melakukan Shutdown atau Reboot server host (Owner only) dengan verifikasi password akun melalui tombol kontrol daya di sidebar.
cara_menggunakan_fitur_di_perangkat_ini.real_terminal: Membuka terminal OS interaktif (Powershell/Bash) langsung di browser via xterm.js dan node-pty. Mendukung hotkey shell asli dan editor berbasis CLI (vim, nano, top).
cara_menggunakan_fitur_di_perangkat_ini.tmux_sessions: Membuat sesi terminal yang tetap hidup di background server meskipun browser ditutup. Mendukung pembuatan sesi baru, attach terminal, dan menghentikan sesi (kill) langsung dari halaman.
cara_menggunakan_fitur_di_perangkat_ini.cloudflare_tunnel: Mengekspos port dashboard Ndelok ke internet luar secara aman (public link) menggunakan Cloudflare Tunnel (baik quick tunnel trycloudflare.com maupun token custom).
cara_menggunakan_fitur_di_perangkat_ini.file_manager: Manajemen berkas workspace secara penuh meliputi CRUD file/folder, Monaco Code Editor dengan shortcut Ctrl+S, upload file/folder, dan download direktori sebagai ZIP secara on-the-fly.

features: Penyetelan systemInstruction Aira (IT Support Specialist) sebagai otak AI Copilot.
Pre-seeding pembukaan percakapan dengan statement selamat datang dari Aira secara otomatis.
Sinkronisasi penuh dev server (vite.config.js) untuk mendukung endpoints REST API Tmux dan handler Socket.IO tmux session multiplexing.
Otomatisasi start Cloudflare Tunnel saat boot di dev mode.
Akses system file manager __root__ untuk owner di dev mode.
Pemisahan backend dari Vite plugin ke production server mandiri (server.js).
Asset caching static files di production.
SPA fallback route handler pada server.js.
Pembaruan install.sh untuk mendukung npm start dan PM2.
Penyatuan halaman Servers & Plugins.
Integrasi ZeroTier VPN: join network (16 hex) via CLI, leave network (verifikasi password + matikan service), toggle service systemctl/net start.
Pencatatan state ZeroTier lokal di database zerotier.json.
Komponen PasswordInput reusable dengan visibility toggle (ikon mata).
fixes: Deteksi root privilege otomatis (skip sudo jika sudah root).
Resolving path CLI Windows untuk ZeroTier One.

features: ZeroTier Leave Network dengan pengamanan password.
Auto-Restart project pada reboot sistem jika status sebelumnya Running.
Live process output terminal real-time via node-pty (PTY) dan Socket.io.
Pilihan Access Type Port vs Custom Domain saat provision/edit project.
Smart Port Link otomatis mengikuti hostname pembuka dashboard.
Real Terminal (xterm.js + node-pty) interaktif (vim, nano, top).
ZeroTier VPN Control dasar.
System Power Control (Shutdown & Reboot) via dashboard (Owner only).
Network Speed Monitor real-time.
fixes: Throttling CPU warning log (1x per menit).
Audit log filtering untuk request internal.

features: Dual Upload Mode: GitHub clone vs Upload folder lokal.
File Manager Terintegrasi: CRUD file, Monaco Editor (Ctrl+S), ZIP folder download streaming.
Path traversal protection.
Dashboard, project management, deployment via GitHub, audit logging, telemetry monitoring.
